summary: Excellent audience recording captures an explosive second set highlighted by a smoking Sugar Magnolia > Scarlet Begonias jam, Weather Report Suite and Dark Star.
review: The tape offers crystal‑clear audience sound that puts you right in the garden, complete with fireworks and crowd roar. Reviewers rave about the first set’s tight playing and a second‑set that “explodes,” especially the extended Sugar Magnolia > Scarlet Begonias sequence, Weather Report Suite and Dark Star. The overall vibe is overwhelmingly positive, with fans calling it ear‑candy and an all‑time favorite.

ai_rating.rationale: All five detailed reviews are 4–5 stars and praise both the musical performance (standout jams, superb set flow) and the high‑quality audience recording; no negatives were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced AUD capture with vivid crowd ambience, fireworks and instrument separation; reviewers describe it as “ear candy,” “decent recording mixed properly through the sound system,” and excellent on good speakers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised as tight and gorgeous; second set “explodes” with extended jams that build energy, delivering a seamless, high‑impact concert experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his overall presence and guitar work; reviewers love "Jerry's AUD" and call the performance ear‑candy.
band_member_comments.Bob: Quoted jokingly during the Sugar Magnolia > Scarlet Begonias jam, showing his crowd interaction.
